seo.title: Olea Digitalis | Smart Olive Grove & Digital Traceability
seo.description: App for olive growers and digital traceability platform. Precision olive growing with sensors (OleaDnode) and robotic assistants. Every bottle gets a digital ID document.
seo.keywords: olive growers app, digital olive grove, smart olive grove, precision agriculture, olive grove sensors, olive oil traceability, digital identification document, olive oil certificate, AgroTech Croatia, OPG Dalmatia, Vela Luka

hero.title: OleaD: Digital Traceability that Raises the Value of Your Olive Oil
hero.subtitle: Smart and simple management of family farms (OPGs) with technology that works inside the olive grove – completely without a cellular signal. Protect the authenticity of every drop and prove premium quality to your customers.

projekt.title: A System Built on the Ground, for People on the Ground
projekt.description: Forget about complicated spreadsheets, lost notebooks, and tedious typing on your phone in the middle of a harvest. OleaD is a system that silently works in the background while you are in the olive grove, turning your daily efforts into irrefutable digital proof of quality that customers today seek and appreciate.

pillars.title: Three Pillars of the OleaD System: How It Works in Practice?

p1.title: 1. One Touch at the Entrance (Smart PWA Application)
p1.desc: When you enter the olive grove in the morning, just tap your phone once against the tag at the entrance. Thanks to PWA (Progressive Web App) technology, you don't need to download anything from the Store or waste phone storage. One touch opens the digital file of your estate. The main advantage? It works in complete isolation, without a single bar of cellular signal. Everything you write is safely stored on your device and sent to the server only when you return home to your Wi-Fi in the evening.

p2.title: 2. Automatic Recognition of the Tree in Front of You
p2.desc: The app uses your smartphone's internal sensors (orientation and compass) to detect exactly which olive tree you are standing in front of. The system relies on an ultra-precise digital cadastre previously created by our field station. Oversized buttons adapted for outdoor work appear on the screen: the app itself asks "Is Olive #42 being harvested?". One tap and the data is saved. User friction is reduced to zero.

p3.title: 3. Digital Certificate on the Bottle (Blockchain Traceability)
p3.desc: All historical data on microclimate, pruning dates, fertilization, and the exact hour of harvest is permanently recorded in a central digital vault and secured by blockchain technology. This means the data is immutable and cannot be falsified. When a customer in a restaurant or abroad scans the QR code on your bottle, they receive absolute proof of origin "from field to table".

v1.item1: Creation of a precise digital olive tree cadastre using advanced field stations.
v1.item2: Offline-first PWA mobile application that works without mobile network access.
v1.item3: Automatic recognition of trees using compass and motion sensors on the mobile phone.
v1.item4: Central cloud system for data storage and digital certificate generation.

v2.item1: Autonomous field assistants to automate data collection and facilitate physical work in the olive grove.

dnevnik.title: Digital Cultivation Log
dnevnik.description: A solution for bureaucracy that works even in the most remote olive grove. Enter activities without internet (Offline-First), while the system automatically pulls data from sensors. Generate reports for certificates and subsidies in one click.

oleadbot.title: OleaDbot system: From precision Mapper to field assistant
oleadbot.description: Robotics in olive growing is not science fiction, but a necessity to reduce human fatigue and ensure 100% data accuracy. We develop our robotic system in two clear phases:
oleadbot.f1_desc: The heart of our field system is already here. The powerful Raspberry Pi 5 mapper has been successfully tested in a real environment (TRL 6 readiness level). It serves as a mobile base that passes through the olive grove, wirelessly wakes up sensors and vacuums data without the need for the internet. In a few days, we will integrate the RTK GPS module, which will allow us to map and create a digital cadastre of each of your olive trees with an accuracy of just a few centimeters!
oleadbot.f2_desc: Once the software base on the VPS, the mobile application, and the sensors work in perfect synchronicity, we will migrate the mapper to a robust, autonomous wheeled structure. This robot will serve as a physical assistant in the field – helping you carry heavy crates uphill and automatically patrolling the olive grove.

oleadnode.title: OleaD-Nodes: Autonomous "Mushrooms" protecting canopy microclimate
oleadnode.description: To prove the ideal growing conditions and fruit health to buyers or inspectors, you no longer have to guess. Our autonomous mushroom-shaped stations track every parameter directly beneath the tree.
oleadnode.put_naslov: Our technological development roadmap (Transparent and honest):
oleadnode.t1_desc: The first test electronics based on the powerful and low-power ESP32 microcontroller already successfully read data in our test environment.
oleadnode.t2_desc: In a few days, as soon as HZZ green and digital transition incentives are approved, we will launch housing production on advanced 3D printers using industrial UV-resistant and storm-resistant PETG material.
oleadnode.t3_desc: New versions bring advanced soil moisture sensors and solar power which puts the system in deep sleep mode – the station wakes up only when sending data, consuming zero energy from the grid.

o_projektu.uvod: A fusion of tradition, technology, and vision for the future of olive growing.
o_projektu.povijest: My name is Ivo Cetinić, and for more than two decades, I have been developing websites and digital solutions. My internet story began in 1997 when I first came into contact with web design and graphic tools like Adobe Photoshop 5.5. Over the years, I gained experience working in the IT sector and building dozens of websites, following the evolution of the internet from Web1 through Web2 to today's Web3 era. At the same time, olive growing has always been a part of my family. I inherited my great-grandfather's olive grove, and my goal was to improve the tracking of its production and ensure accurate data for each individual olive tree — from planting to processing.
o_projektu.poc: As a Proof of Concept (PoC), I created an ASA NFT (Algorand Standard Asset) for the first olive tree (VL01-T001), demonstrating that the idea is not only theoretically possible but also practical. This digital record serves as a permanent guarantee of the tree's location, variety, and ownership on the blockchain.
o_projektu.blockchain_rjesenje: Olea Digitalis: Blockchain as a Service (BaaS) system for olive growers and mills that enables simple, transparent, and immutable certification and traceability of extra virgin olive oil. By scanning a QR code, consumers get the full story of the olive oil bottle — from the tree of harvest to the laboratory processing results.

primjeri_iz_svijeta.opis: Croatian digital agricultural platform enabling investments in pig halves with traceability and digital block registration.
Implementation of blockchain technology in the Spanish olive oil industry to increase transparency and prevent counterfeiting.
One of the global pioneers in mass application of blockchain olive oil traceability from groves to store shelves.
Croatian portal Maslinar.com reports on new AgroTech technologies, digital harvest logging, and traceability advantages.
Italy's largest olive oil producer consortium partners with Euranet and adopts the sustainable Algorand blockchain for traceability.

o_projektu.vizija: Vision of the future — Web3 and olive growers. We want to build a stable digital platform that will enable small family farms (OPGs) to prove the premium quality of their products using simple, accessible tools. Through automated data entry, field robotic assistants, and blockchain protection, we aim to position Croatian olive growing as a global leader in digital transparency.
o_projektu.cta_naslov: Want to secure the traceability of your products?
o_projektu.cta_opis: Join the Olea Digitalis platform and offer your customers irrefutable proof of quality and origin. Connect your production with modern digital standards.

certifikati.opis: Traceability and proof of authenticity for each tree and olive oil batch on the blockchain.
certifikati.opis_001: First registered tree with digital ID card and biometric signature.
certifikati.opis_002: Registration of Drobnica variety olive tree, Vela Luka.
certifikati.info_callout: This section will display the history of digital certificates, search options for tree metadata, and direct scanning and generation of QR codes for extra virgin olive oil bottles.

dnevnik.naslov: Digital Cultivation Log: Your Paperless OPG History Book
dnevnik.opis: Data entry in the field is often a chore, and paper logs are no longer accepted by inspections in the same way. Our PWA mobile app lets you open a complete historical card of your farm with a single click at the olive grove entrance – completely without mobile signal.
dnevnik.funkcionalnosti: What we offer and how we make life easier:
dnevnik.f1_desc: No need to manually search for which plot you're in. The system automatically detects your location and suggests actions.
dnevnik.f2_desc: Oversized buttons designed for outdoor work let you record pruning, fertilizing, or harvest hour with a single tap.
dnevnik.f3_title: Peace of mind before EU inspections
dnevnik.f3_desc: The system automatically generates reports that fully satisfy strict EU standards for origin tracking.
dnevnik.status_opis: Our software system is in the final phase (90% complete) and we are currently migrating it to an advanced, isolated VPS server infrastructure to ensure maximum speed and 100% security of your data, leaving slow and insecure classic hosting solutions behind.

dnevnik_uzgoja.title: Digital Cultivation Log — Your OPG History Book
dnevnik_uzgoja.description: A software solution that is 90% completed and ready to migrate to advanced VPS infrastructure for maximum data security and speed. It enables 100% offline logging of pruning, fertilization, and crop protection in compliance with strict EU organic production laws.

oleadnode.title: OleaD-Nodes — Autonomous canopy microclimate stations
oleadnode.description: A system in the early stages of development. Our first test electronics based on the ESP32 microcontroller have been assembled and successfully tested. Upon approval of the HZZ green and digital transition incentives, we will launch 3D printing of housings from industrial PETG material and the integration of advanced soil moisture sensors.

oleadbot.title: OleaDbot System — From TRL 6 Mapper to field assistant
oleadbot.description: While the physical wheeled robot is in the conceptual phase, our OleaDbot-MAPPER is in a high stage of readiness (TRL 6 operational prototype). Based on the Raspberry Pi 5 computer, it is ready to create an ultra-precise digital olive cadastre as soon as we integrate the RTK GPS module from the incentives.
